# dokku_storage_assignment (Resource)

Assigns (mounts) a dokku_storage entry onto an app (`dokku storage:mount`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app` (String) App to mount the storage entry onto.
- `destination` (String) Container path the storage entry is mounted at.
- `storage_name` (String) Name of the dokku_storage entry to mount.

### Read-Only

- `host_path` (String) Resolved host path backing storage_name.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
